message:
chore(beads): update wa-1u90p.4.3 progress notes for dirty-rect compile-fix slice

Add SageReef session notes to wa-1u90p.4.3 documenting the compile-fix
work for dirty-rect/tile extraction APIs (Vec type annotations for
no_std inference) with 280 passing tests. Bead remains in_progress
pending renderer upload path integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -205,7 +205,7 @@
 {"id":"wa-1u90p.4.1","title":"Root-cause stretched-text and transient invalid-frame artifacts during resize","description":"Identify exact ordering/path issues that expose intermediate invalid buffers or stale transforms. Produce a concrete fault model and mitigation design.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Implementation is complete for the stated scope and behavior is validated.
- Unit tests are added/updated for core logic and edge cases.
- Integration and/or e2e coverage is updated where this task affects multi-component behavior.
- Structured telemetry/logging is added for observability and regression triage.
- No regressions in existing terminal semantics within the affected scope.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":240,"created_at":"2026-02-13T00:25:45.594914Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-14T07:12:15.704255Z","closed_at":"2026-02-14T07:12:15.704239Z","close_reason":"LavenderCastle: Root-cause analysis complete. Identified 5 fault classes (F1: PTY-terminal dimension gap, F2: non-atomic render reads, F3: tab fanout inconsistency, F4: stale intent commit, F5: cursor position transient). Produced concrete fault model in docs/resize-artifact-fault-model-wa-1u90p.4.1.md with artifact class mapping, severity assessment, mitigation design (M1-M4), and recommended execution order. Primary cause of stretched text is F1 (PTY resized before terminal, creating window where child output uses new dimensions but terminal has old). Fix path: ADR-0011 transaction model first, then atomic PTY+terminal resize, then snapshot rendering.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["artifacts","gpu","reflow","render","resize","track-render"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.1","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.1.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:26:31.555552Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.1","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:25:45.594914Z","created_by":"jemanuel"}],"comments":[{"id":219,"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.1","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"LavenderCastle: Starting root-cause investigation. Will trace the resize flow from intent through screen resize, terminal reflow, to render/presentation, identifying where stale transforms or intermediate invalid buffers are exposed.","created_at":"2026-02-14T06:58:45Z"}]}
 {"id":"wa-1u90p.4.10","title":"[Subtask wa-1u90p.4.2] Implement rollback/fallback handling for failed frame commits","description":"## Scope
Add robust rollback path when a candidate frame fails validation/commit.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Failure-injection tests verify clean fallback to last-good frame.
- No user-visible artifact leaks during rollback scenarios.
- Telemetry captures rollback cause taxonomy.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":120,"created_at":"2026-02-13T01:16:04.212574Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-13T01:22:41.205376Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fallback","reflow","render","resize","subtask","track-render"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.10","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:16:04.212574Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.10","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.4.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:17:40.275353Z","created_by":"jemanuel"}]}
 {"id":"wa-1u90p.4.2","title":"Implement last-good-frame hold and atomic frame swap for resize transitions","description":"Guarantee users never see unstable intermediate layout by presenting only coherent frames. Preserve visual continuity while background reflow converges.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Implementation is complete for the stated scope and behavior is validated.
- Unit tests are added/updated for core logic and edge cases.
- Integration and/or e2e coverage is updated where this task affects multi-component behavior.
- Structured telemetry/logging is added for observability and regression triage.
- No regressions in existing terminal semantics within the affected scope.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":360,"created_at":"2026-02-13T00:25:45.699828Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-13T01:17:40.592502Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["gpu","presentation","reflow","render","resize","track-render"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.2","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:26:31.769279Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.2","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:25:45.699828Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.2","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:26:31.662724Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.2","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.4.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:17:40.592461Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.2","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.4.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:17:40.381360Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.2","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.4.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:17:40.485087Z","created_by":"jemanuel"}]}

- No regressions in existing terminal semantics within the affected scope.","notes":"2026-02-14 SageReef: Worked this bead using bv robot triage + br ready intersection. In frankenterm/surface/src/lib.rs, completed compile-fix slice for dirty-rect/tile extraction APIs by adding explicit Vec type annotations required by no_std inference (Vec<DirtyRect> and Vec<Range<usize>>). Validation: rustfmt frankenterm/surface/src/lib.rs and CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-sagereef-wa-1u90p-4-3 cargo test -p frankenterm-surface (280 tests passed). Bead remains in_progress pending integration of dirty rect/tile outputs into downstream renderer upload path and runtime metrics wiring.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SageReef","estimated_minutes":360,"created_at":"2026-02-13T00:25:45.803592Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-14T07:24:48.237240Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["dirty-rect","gpu","reflow","render","resize","track-render"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.3","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:26:31.982075Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.3","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:25:45.803592Z","created_by":"jemanuel"},{"issue_id":"wa-1u90p.4.3","depends_on_id":"wa-1u90p.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:26:31.874295Z","created_by":"jemanuel"}]}
